mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, status, tier, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM customers WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND last_login_at < #{cutoffDate} ORDER BY last_login_at ASC
SELECT id, name, email, status, tier, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM customers WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, c.status, c.tier, c.last_login_at, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM customers c WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.tier != 'VIP' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT customer_id, SUM(order_amount) as total_amount FROM customer_orders WHERE order_date >= #{startDate} AND status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY customer_id HAVING total_amount >= #{minTotalAmount} ) orders WHERE orders.customer_id = c.id ) ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, email, status, tier, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM customers ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, name, email, status, tier, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM customers WHERE status = #{status} AND tier = #{tier} ORDER BY email ASC
